code: import React from"react";import{useCurrency}from"../theme/useCurrency";import"./DebtSummary.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const DebtSummary=_ref=>{let{debts}=_ref;const{currency}=useCurrency();const totalDebt=debts.filter(d=>d.type==="debt").reduce((sum,d)=>sum+d.amount,0);const totalLending=debts.filter(d=>d.type==="lending").reduce((sum,d)=>sum+d.amount,0);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"summary-cards",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card expenses",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Total Debt"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[currency," ",totalDebt]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card income",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Total Lending"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[currency," ",totalLending]})]})]});};export default DebtSummary;
